codeMarkPlus.defaultLanguage.description: Default language to be used for comments
codeMarkPlus.isCommentMessageWrapped.des: Determine whether to wrap the comment message with additional formatting or markers
codeMarkPlus.commentMessagePrefix.descri: Prefix added at the beginning of the comment message
codeMarkPlus.commentDelimiter.descriptio: Delimiter to separate different elements inside the comment message (e.g., file name, function)
codeMarkPlus.commentMessageSuffix.descri: Suffix added at the end of the comment message
codeMarkPlus.addEmptyLineBeforeComment.d: Insert an empty line before the comment message for improved readability
codeMarkPlus.addEmptyLineAfterComment.de: Insert an empty line after the comment message for improved readability
codeMarkPlus.literalOpen.description: The opening character used to delimit string literals (e.g., double quotes, single quotes, backticks)
codeMarkPlus.literalClose.description: The closing character used to delimit string literals (e.g., double quotes, single quotes, backticks)
codeMarkPlus.useCurrentPosition.descript: Use the current cursor position to insert the comment
codeMarkPlus.author.description: The author's name for the comment
codeMarkPlus.highlightActive.description: Enable dynamic highlighting while the editor is active
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.keyword.desc: Keyword to match (e.g., TODO, FIXME, NOTE, HACK, WIP). For 'word' or 'substring' rules, both 'TODO' and 'TODO:' formats are supported for compatibility. Ignored when 'pattern' is provided.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.color.descri: Background color for the decoration. Accepts CSS colors: hex (#RRGGBB, #RRGGBBAA), rgb(), rgba(), hsl(). Prefer semi-transparent rgba(), e.g. 'rgba(255,204,0,0.3)'.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.bold.descrip: Render matched text in bold (fontWeight: bold).
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.italic.descr: Render matched text in italic (fontStyle: italic).
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.matchMode.de: How to match: 'word' = whole tokens; 'substring' = inside a token; 'regex' = ECMAScript RegExp using 'pattern'. If omitted, inferred: 'regex' when 'pattern' exists, otherwise 'word'. Note: For 'word' and 'substring' with 'keyword', both 'TODO' and 'TODO:' are supported for compatibility. Use 'regex' to customize separators.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.pattern.desc: ECMAScript regular expression used when matchMode is 'regex' (example: 'BUG-\d+'). Do not include flags; prefer inline groups if needed.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.caseSensitiv: Whether matching is case sensitive. Default: true. Set to false to perform case-insensitive matching.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.wholeWord.de: Enforce whole-word matching. Default: true. Applies to 'word' and can constrain 'substring'.
Limit this rule to specific VS Code language IDs (e.g., ['typescript','javascript','python','markdown']).
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.strikethroug: Apply strikethrough in addition to other text styles.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.priority.des: Priority used to resolve overlapping decorations. Higher numbers win (can be negative). Default: 0.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.description: Array of rules defining what to detect and how to style it. Each rule must define either 'keyword' or 'pattern' and a 'color'. When using 'keyword' with 'word' or 'substring', both 'TODO' and 'TODO:' are supported for compatibility; use 'regex' if you need different separators. Optional fields configure styles, matching behavior, language scoping, and overlap priority. Used for in-editor highlighting and Tag Browser indexing.
Configuration for the decoration applied to special highlight directives (e.g., 'HIGHLIGHT: next line')
codeMarkPlus.customTemplates.language.de: The programming language for which this template applies (e.g., 'javascript', 'python', 'dart')
codeMarkPlus.customTemplates.template.de: The comment message template. Use variables like {{{commentMessagePrefix}}}, {{{commentMessageSuffix}}}, etc. Example: "[// {{{commentMessagePrefix}}} {{{fileName}}} {{{commentMessageSuffix}}}]"
codeMarkPlus.customTemplates.description: Custom comment message templates for different languages. You can define a template per language using available variables (e.g., {{{commentMessagePrefix}}}, {{{commentMessageSuffix}}}, {{{fileName}}}, {{{author}}})
codeMarkPlus.insertComment.title: Insert comment
codeMarkPlus.changeWorkspace.title: Change workspace folder
codeMarkPlus.tagBrowserView.title: Tag Browser
codeMarkPlus.tagBrowserView.welcomeMessa: No tags found. Configure highlight rules in settings to start indexing.
Glob patterns of files to include when searching (e.g., ['**/*{js,ts,md}']).
Glob patterns of files and folders to exclude from searches (e.g., ['**/node_modules/**','**/.git/**']).
codeMarkPlus.files.maxSearchRecursionDep: Maximum directory depth for recursive search (0 = unlimited).
codeMarkPlus.files.supportsHiddenFiles.d: Include dotfiles and hidden files (those starting with a dot) in search results.
codeMarkPlus.files.preserveGitignoreSett: Respect .gitignore rules when searching for files.
codeMarkPlus.files.showFilePathInResults: Show the relative folder path next to each file in results.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagProfiles.descriptio: Map of tag profiles to customize priority, icon, and color per tag (e.g., { "TODO": { "priority": 10, "icon": "$(tag)", "color": "#ffcc00" } }).
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagProfiles.priority.d: Priority used for sorting and resolving conflicts. Higher values indicate more important tags.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagProfiles.icon.descr: Codicon name (e.g., $(tag)) or emoji to display for this tag in the Tag Browser.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagProfiles.color.desc: Color for this tag (hex like #RRGGBB or rgba()).
codeMarkPlus.performance.maxFilesToIndex: Maximum number of files to scan for tags per workspace to cap indexing time.
codeMarkPlus.performance.concurrencyLimi: Maximum number of files processed concurrently during indexing.
codeMarkPlus.performance.batchSize.descr: Number of files to process per batch before yielding to keep the UI responsive.
codeMarkPlus.notes.notesFolder.descripti: Folder (relative to the workspace) where CodeMark+ stores notes and generated files.
codeMarkPlus.notes.createDefaultFiles.de: Create default note files (TODO and Scratchpad) inside the notes folder.
codeMarkPlus.notes.todoFileName.descript: File name for the default TODO notes file.
codeMarkPlus.notes.scratchpadFileName.de: File name for the default Scratchpad notes file.
codeMarkPlus.features.quickActions.descr: User-defined quick actions that run VS Code commands with optional arguments and UI metadata.
Display name of the quick action.
codeMarkPlus.features.quickActions.comma: VS Code command ID to execute.
Optional array of arguments to pass to the command.
codeMarkPlus.features.quickActions.short: Optional description of a keyboard shortcut for this action.
Optional Codicon name (e.g., $(tag)) or emoji to show for the action.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagPriorities.descript: List of tag priority overrides with optional color and icon metadata.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagPriorities.tag.desc: Tag text to match (e.g., TODO, FIXME).
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagPriorities.priority: Priority used for sorting and resolving conflicts. Higher values indicate more important tags.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagPriorities.color.de: Optional color for this tag (hex like #RRGGBB or rgba()).
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagPriorities.icon.des: Optional Codicon name (e.g., $(tag)) or emoji to display for this tag.
codeMarkPlus.appendToTodoFile.title: Append to TODO file
codeMarkPlus.openTodoFile.title: Open TODO file
